labels.name: stories_industry_location_list
labels.description:
Stories by Industry/Location
Simplified endpoint that runs the same logic as the main stories endpoint, with a restricted parameter set (only industry and location). Stories can either be

 -- IndustrySectorUpdate

 or activities in an organization's lifecycle. We track the following activities:

 -

labels.name: stories_organization_list
labels.description:
Stories by Organization
Simplified endpoint that runs the same logic as the main stories endpoint, with a restricted parameter set (only org_name). Stories can either be

 -- IndustrySectorUpdate

 or activities in an organization's lifecycle. We track the following activities:

 -- CorporateFinance

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: register_and_get_key_create · Private data: register_and_get_key_create · Public sink: register_and_get_key_create · Destructive: register_and_get_key_create, stories_industry_location_list, stories_organization_list.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: register_and_get_key_create · Private data: register_and_get_key_create · Public sink: register_and_get_key_create · Destructive: register_and_get_key_create, stories_industry_location_list, stories_organization_list

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
